title: For the Next One
author: Anonymous Adventurer
variants:
If you find this on me, I'm sorry about the smell.

I came in through a door I can't describe anymore. I think I was looking for something specific. I don't remember what. I remember being sure, and that's the part that bothers me — that being sure can fade so completely.

Take the sword if its still here. It's not enchanted but it swings true and I sharpened it last night, which apparently was a waste of effort but at least it's a gift now.

Don't follow my route. There's nothing useful behind me. Everything I found, I'm wearing.

Whatever you came in looking for — write it down. Now. Before the train decides you didn't.
